creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
NAMEI events are generated by namei().  symlink(2) doesn't call namei() on the second parameter, so this patch doesn't really make sense.

ktrace(2) in general does not show you arbitrary system call parameters.  Maybe it would be useful to extend KTR_STRUCT to support paths.  Then "ktrace -t t" would do what you want.  But if you want to see parameters, you can also just use truss or dtrace.
